filename: UK Data Regulations - Papers from Karla.docx
summary: This document outlines critical UK NHS regulatory frameworks for health-tech suppliers, including the Digital Technology Assessment Criteria (DTAC) and Evidence Standards Framework (ESF). It details the Data Security and Protection Toolkit (DSPT) requirements for accessing patient data and includes internal action items regarding compliance registration. The text mixes public regulatory guidance with informal user notes and placeholders.
